title: Kajis sacrifice was inside Mark06
wikitext:
[]: Kaji's sacrifice was inside Mark.06             Quote Post by AsukaShikinami10 » Wed Jan 31, 2024 6:10 pm So hear me out you guys... Last movie we saw Shinji about to sacrifice himself to restore the world and erase all Evas by impaling himself with a spear. I think it was Kaworu the one who said a sacrifice was needed to stop impacts, so what if... Kaji used the militar carrier to transport himself down to the bottomost part of Central Dogma to pilot the autonomous Mark.06? That would algo help explain why Mark.06 had the spear go through its core (and would probably end the debate of whether Mark.06 was pulling in or out the Cassius Spear). Maybe Kaji really sacrificed himself by boarding and piloting the merged Mark.06 and used the spear to make said sacrifice in order to put an end to 3rd Impact. What do you all think?

[]: Re: Kaji's sacrifice was inside Mark.06             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Jan 31, 2024 10:25 pm AsukaShikinami10 wrote: I think it was Kaworu the one who said a sacrifice was needed to stop impacts, so what if... Kaji used the militar carrier to transport himself down to the bottomost part of Central Dogma to pilot the autonomous Mark.06?

[]: Re: Kaji's sacrifice was inside Mark.06             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Feb 01, 2024 3:56 am I've always operated under the assumption that Kaji used the carrier to get himself and the spear to 01 and/or 06, to do whatever it was that was necessary to stop N3I. As Konja says, the details are not entirely clear, but there is an implied chronology; as demonstrated by the end of Ha and the according line in Shin, the spear alone going through 01's core was not enough to fully stop N3I, so my assumption is that whatever happened in detail, it had to involve 06 somehow taking over from 01, and then arresting its own impact even by ways of double spear

[]: Re: Kaji's sacrifice was inside Mark.06             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Tue Jul 30, 2024 8:06 pm "I want EVA to be like Gundam, where anyone can make their own take on it" -Hideaki Anno [roughly] >there's a giant gap between 2.0 and 3.0 with a ton of unanswered questions and a ton of pivotal plot events we never see The door is open homies, when is somebody gonna get up the balls to pitch an OVA or a manga or something set between 2 and 3 that goes into all this?

[]: Re: Kaji's sacrifice was inside Mark.06             Quote Post by nerv bae » Fri Aug 09, 2024 9:28 am AdamMalkovitch wrote: "I want EVA to be like Gundam, where anyone can make their own take on it" -Hideaki Anno [roughly] >there's a giant gap between 2.0 and 3.0 with a ton of unanswered questions and a ton of pivotal plot events we never see The door is open homies, when is somebody gonna get up the balls to pitch an OVA or a manga or something set between 2 and 3 that goes into all this?

[]: Re: Kaji's sacrifice was inside Mark.06             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Tue Aug 13, 2024 4:13 pm Mm, damn, that shit good! Though if the proposed project were official, the creators could very likely request an actual timeline of information from Khara without having to rely on speculation, as accurate as that collection of events seems to be. It's great for fan works, but an official Khara sanctioned "2.5" story would be supported by them and their NDA-protected scrapped movie ideas, as well as their Q & Shin scripts and development material. Shit maybe I should try pitching something if nothing of the sort comes out by the time I'm done with my personal project, I'm already experienced with writing so maybe I could propose another light novel. Cause if Evangelion Anima can be published then fuckin anything can, my God what a disaster
